nodes.label: Stable per-path address-shaped string when no real address is set.     Format: c
Split body into overlapping chunks on paragraph boundaries when possible.     He
Tier-3 prefix: page title + first sentence of the page body.     Free, hermetic,
Ephemeral cache_control dict when the page body clears the Haiku cache     floor
Tier-1 prefix: direct Anthropic API call, Haiku, prompt-cached page body.      T
Tier-2 prefix: `claude -p` subprocess (uses CC subscription, no API key).
Choose the contextual-prefix generation tier.      Without allow_egress=True, AL
Asymmetric fallback by design:       - tier="anthropic-api" → on failure, try cl
